Code fragment: public final TableField<TbPrdFobRecord, Double> TRADING_PRICE = createField(DSL.name("TRADING_PRICE"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.DOUBLE.defaultValue(org.jooq.impl.DSL.field("NULL", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.DOUBLE)), this, "거래가(U$)");
Explanation: The TRADING_PRICE column stores monetary values (trading price in U$) using DOUBLE, which can cause precision loss in financial calculations. Use DECIMAL or NUMERIC with appropriate precision and scale (e.g., DECIMAL(19,4)) to ensure accurate currency calculations.
